name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.10: playable starter scenes (Player Room intro -> name entry -> CORE LAB -> 3-way starter pick KERNITE/RECURSE/BYTEFLY), 56 cinderized creature sprites, 14 script events, 14 backgrounds + new cc_player_room.png, overworld tileset, 5 sound FX, 5-type chart, 5 named gym leaders (ARCHIVIST EOS/WARDEN SOMA/CONDUCTOR TEMPO/COURIER HERMES/FOREMAN ATLAS), USB-tied catching loop spec.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
